en.extract:
The yellow-sided flowerpecker (Dicaeum aureolimbatum) is a species of bird in the family Dicaeidae.
It is endemic to Sulawesi and adjacent islands in Indonesia.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''yellow-sided flowerpecker''' ('''''Dicaeum aureolimbatum''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Dicaeidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Sulawesi]] and adjacent islands in [[Indonesia]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].

zh.extract:
黄胁啄花鸟（学名：Dicaeum aureolimbatum），是啄花鸟科啄花鸟属的一种，为印度尼西亚的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
黄胁啄花鸟的平均体重约为8.1克。栖息地包括种植园、亚热带或热带的湿润低地林、亚热带或热带的（低地）湿润疏灌丛、乡村花园和城市。
